shorts.title: PennDOT repair, patch up roads as Pothole Season hits NEPA

shorts.description: WILKES-BARRE TOWNSHIP, LUZERNE COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It's everyone's least favorite season between winter and spring in Pennsylvania: Pothole season. In Luzerne County, Pennsylvania Department of Transportation crews were taking advantage of Monday's nice weather to repair and patch potholes in Wilkes-Barre Township, near the Highland Park Boulevard exit and the Mountain Top exit. Road crews [...]

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — We're in the home stretch for preparations leading to Scranton's 64th Annual Saint Patrick's Parade. Monday afternoon, the Department of Public Works painted festive green traffic lines along the route of the parade. They began at the intersection of Wyoming Avenue and Mulberry Street and finished at Vine Street. It's [...]
